Footer.disclaimer: Companion support only. Not medical, legal, or emergency services. No claim of 24/7 protection or guaranteed safety. By using Korea SafeMate you acknowledge these limits.
Footer.disclaimerShort: This service is designed for practical local support and useful information. It does not replace medical, legal, or emergency services, and does not guarantee 24/7 protection.

Brand.tagline: Local insights · Guardian community · On-the-ground support
Brand.description: Korea SafeMate connects local insights, a Guardian community, and on-the-ground support when it matters. It is not a generic travel marketplace, but a platform built around trust.

Home.metaDescription: Trusted local insights and Guardians for your Korea trip — regions, booking, and calm support.
Home.heroTitle: Trusted local insights. The right person when you need one.
Home.heroLead: City guides, reviewed Guardians, and bookable support — one calm flow.
Home.processClarity: We review every request before matching. Most handoffs within 1–2 days.
Home.trustBandLead: No surprises. Review scope before you book.
Home.regionsSectionLead: Open a hub for routes, tips, and local context.
Home.discoverSectionTitle: Signals from the ground, more useful than a brochure
Home.discoverSectionLead: Start with local posts and Guardian recommendations, then request human support only when you need it.
Home.servicesSectionLead: Arrival, K-routes, first day — clear scope.
Home.howItWorksLead: Insights, reputation, and support stay connected.
Home.scopeNote: Not medical, legal, or emergency care. Check scope before booking.
Home.layersLead: Open participation for intel; separate verification for matching; external chat handoff in the MVP — clarity over hype.
Home.layer1Body: City tips and what you need right after landing — reviewed, not noisy.
Home.layer2Body: Trust comes from contributions and reviews — not volume alone.
Home.layer3Body: Reviewed matching first. Early handoffs use external channels you already use.
Home.sessionsLead: Arrival, K-routes, and first-day help — clear scope, practical support.
Home.ctaTitle: A smoother first day in Korea
Home.ctaLead: Share timing and what you need. We’ll match you with the right Guardian.

Services.metaDescription: Arrival, K-Route, and First 24 Hours companion support in Seoul.
Services.title: Companion services
Services.intro: Fixed-scope support sessions. Pricing shown is indicative for MVP planning — final quotes may vary by distance and timing.

arrival.title: Arrival Companion
arrival.shortDescription: From airport or station to your stay, make your first move easier.
bullets: Transit card, SIM, and first-trip setup
Check-in help and light local settling support

k_route.title: K-Route Companion
k_route.shortDescription: Get to the places you care about, with less friction along the way.
bullets: Help with ordering, navigation, and on-site communication

first_24h.title: First 24 Hours
first_24h.shortDescription: For the first day in Korea, when everything feels most unfamiliar.
bullets: Help with apps, transit, food, and getting oriented
Practical support within a clearly defined scope

Explore.metaDescription: Region-based local intelligence — moderated, practical, Guardian-grounded.
Explore.heroTitle: Real local intelligence — before you book
Explore.heroDescription: Explore is curated for decisions: hot places, food queues, K-content execution, shopping mechanics, and practical arrival tips. Most insights come from Guardians with visible tiers and contribution history — not generic blog posts or open forums.
Explore.heroNote: We gather practical information for both Korean and international readers. The aim is Guardian-reviewed clarity — not machine translation.
Explore.regionSectionLead: Phase 1 metros first — structure ready for Phase 2 destinations.
Explore.featuredLead: Trusted locals and seed partners — highlighted for quality, not pay-to-play ads.
Explore.ctaLead: Browse intel first — then book scoped support or start contributing as a Guardian.
Explore.regionHubTagsLead: Filter posts below — same categories as the national Explore view.
Explore.moderationPreviewLead: Shown for ops alignment — travelers normally see approved posts only.
Explore.regionGuardiansLead: Active and verified tiers reflect contribution and separate verification — not hype.

Book.metaDescription: Request trusted local support — reviewed before matching.
Book.title: Request trusted local support
Book.intro: This is a calm, structured intake — not a one-click tour checkout. Share accurate context so we can match you thoughtfully. External chat is only introduced after our team approves scope and a Guardian fit.

TrustScope.title: Service scope and limits
TrustScope.lead: Korea SafeMate focuses on practical local support and useful information. It is not a guided tour, medical or legal assistance, or an emergency-response service. By being clear about scope, we make the experience easier to trust.
included: City-based local insights and reviewed posts
Guardian reputation built through contributions and reviews
On-the-ground support for arrival, K-routes, and first 24 hours
External chat handoff after matching (Telegram, KakaoTalk, WhatsApp, etc.)
excluded: Promotional content or an unmoderated forum
Automatic matching rights based on post count alone
Support that replaces medical, legal, or emergency services
Built-in real-time chat during the MVP phase

BookingSuccess.title: Request submitted
BookingSuccess.body: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will email you at {email} with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.bodyNoEmail: Thank you. Our team will review your context and availability. You are not connected to a Guardian or external chat yet — we will contact you with next steps when matching is ready.
BookingSuccess.mvpNote: (MVP: not saved to database — configure Supabase for persistence.)
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableBody: Open this page from the same browser session right after submitting, or keep your reference ID for support.
BookingSuccess.summaryUnavailableHint: If you refreshed or opened in another device, details are not stored client-side.

Login.title: Log in
Login.description: Authentication is not wired in this MVP build. Use public pages and role dashboards for UI preview only.
